name: What damages from job forklift injury broken arm lost wages?

mainEntity.name: What damages from job forklift injury broken arm lost wages?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical bills, lost wages (66%), TTD/TPD, pain/suffering in third-party claims.** Punitive rare.[1][3] Key factors: Document all costs, future therapy. Utah no cap on economic.[3] Value via permanency rating.
